How it works
Pick your chocolates

Browse up to 8–12 flavors and tap any chocolate to add it to your custom box.

Set your mix

Adjust how much of each flavor you want — use percentages to fill your box exactly the way you like.

Choose your box

Pick from White, Heart, or Square box styles. Upgrade your size anytime.

Add to bag

When your box is full, tap Review your Box. Your custom mix is saved and ready to gift.
